name: agentminmax-observer
description: Complexity-aware observability for Codex and long-horizon agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Codex sessions, tools, tokens, quality, and complexity.
interface.longDescription: AgentMinMax Observer provides a local skill and scripts for exporting agent traces into a quantitative dashboard for long-horizon project research.
defaultPrompt: Create an AgentMinMax dashboard for this Codex run.
